name: The Polling Place That's Actually Fair
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
Whenever the table votes, you may untap The Polling Place That's Actually Fair. (Unlike the rival's Polling Place of the Damned, this one has a ramp, clear signage, and a nonpartisan snack.)
flavorText: No funny business. No haunted booths. Just democracy and a folding table that wobbles in a politically neutral way.

extras.interaction: answer to rival's Polling Place of the Damned
